--- head/sysutils/p5-MogileFS-Utils/pkg-descr	Sat Sep 22 08:25:38 2012	(r304667)
+++ head/sysutils/p5-MogileFS-Utils/pkg-descr	Sat Sep 22 08:32:17 2012	(r304668)
@@ -1,6 +1,4 @@
-This package contains two tools to manage MogileFS:
+This package contains a collection of command line utilities for the
+MogileFS distributed file system.
 
-mogadm - MogileFS admin tool
-mogtool - Inject/extract data to/from a MogileFS installation
-
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/MogileFS-Utils/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/MogileFS-Utils/
